name: csi-breathing-zkp
description: Zero-Knowledge Proof circuits for CSI breathing rate verification

scripts.setup:full: snarkjs groth16 setup build/csi_full_dataframe_analyzer.r1cs keys/powersOfTau28_hez_final_16.ptau keys/csi_full_dataframe_analyzer_0000.zkey && snarkjs zkey contribute keys/csi_full_dataframe_analyzer_0000.zkey keys/csi_full_dataframe_analyzer_final.zkey --name='First contribution' -v && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey keys/csi_full_dataframe_analyzer_final.zkey keys/csi_full_dataframe_analyzer_verification_key.json
